rationale: Educ. Code §29.009 concerns public notice for early childhood special education programs and has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Each school district shall develop a system to notify the population in the district with children who are at least three years of age but younger than six years of age and who are eligible for enrollment in a special education program of the availability of the program.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and this statute.
